series_metadata.series_description: These files contain examination reports for each savings and loan association regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions under Chapters 1151., 1153., 1155., and 1157. of the Ohio Revised Code. These records also contain related examination report correspondence regarding directives issued by the Division.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility twenty (20) years date of examination report ; Electronic: electronic files twenty (20) years date of examination report
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
